title: JavaScript Void Keyword Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential properties and tools for creating robust and cross-browser web experiences with the void operator.

questions.question: Which of these is the most modern and recommended way to build a professional-grade web application in JavaScript for an interactive 'link' that doesn't navigate?
options: Using a <button> element instead of an <a> tag and handling the click in JS.

questions.question: Which value does the JavaScript 'void' operator ALWAYS return, regardless of the expression it evaluates?
What is 'javascript:void(0)' inside a professional web application link (<a>)?
options: To make the site load much faster.
To create a 'dummy' link that performs a JavaScript action on click WITHOUT navigating to a new URL or refreshing.
To choose the colors for the animation.

questions.question: Why is it important to almost ALWAYS avoid 'Universal Selectors' everywhere in your professional JavaScript void-related links?
options: They can make the site load much slower and potentially confuse the link behavior.
They are not supported in modern browsers.
They take up no space in the browser.

questions.question: Which of these is a best practice for a professional-style stylesheet for JavaScript void keywords?
options: Commenting every single line of code.
Using a reset or normalize stylesheet.
Using <button> elements for interactive actions that don't navigate to improve accessibility (A11y).
Using variables for colors and spacing.
